title: [background] and [foreground]
text: [background] and [foreground] The [background] and [foreground] sections of psddef.txt determine how PostScript color definitions are mapped to PostScript colors. [background] LogicalColorName : ColorDefinition { Color } [foreground] LogicalColorName : ColorDefinition { Color } Configuration file: psdfef.txt (Unix only) Arguments Description ColorName Logical color name ColorDefinition Color definition, expressed as a percentage of Red Green Blue color definitions. For example, 1.00 0.00 0.00 is equivalent to 255,0,0 , and 0.5 0.00 0.00 is equivalent to 127,0,0 . Color Optional name of the color. It is treated as a comment and is used only to describe the color for users. Description If you have changed the color definitions in the [background] and [foreground] sections of usys.ini , you should change the definitions in this section. For example: [background] color_0: 0.75 0.75 0.75 grey color_1: 0.00 0.00 1.00 blue color_2: 0.00 1.00 0.00 green color_3: 0.00 1.00 1.00 cyan color_4: 1.00 0.00 0.00 red color_5: 1.00 0.00 1.00 magenta color_6: 1.00 1.00 0.00 yellow color_7: 1.00 1.00 1.00 white ...
